name: agent-trainer-quality
description: Tests that training cycles produce meaningful improvements

criteria.name: reads_performance_log
criteria.description: Checks agent performance history before diagnosing

criteria.name: identifies_specific_issue
criteria.description: Pinpoints specific issue, not vague complaints
criteria.check: output contains specific symptom and root cause

criteria.name: makes_targeted_change
criteria.description: Change is targeted, not a full rewrite
criteria.check: edit is surgical — modifies specific section, not entire file

criteria.name: explains_rationale
criteria.description: Explains why the change should help
criteria.check: output contains reasoning for the change

criteria.name: logs_change
criteria.description: Records the change in performance log
criteria.check: agent_performance_log.md is updated with the training action

criteria.name: testable_improvement
criteria.check: output describes how to test if the change worked
